pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target JDK 21 to utilize new language features and ensure compatibility with the target runtime environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of JaCoCo may fail to instrument or analyze classes compiled for Java 21 due to bytecode version incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Checkstyle plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the Checkstyle plugin may fail to parse or analyze Java 21 syntax or bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Compiler plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the compiler plugin do not support the `--release` flag for Java 21 or may fail to compile Java 21 source code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven WAR plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the WAR plugin may encounter issues processing artifacts or dependencies in a Java 21 environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the modern release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The `source` and `target` options are deprecated in favor of `release` in modern Java toolchains; using `release` ensures consistent API usage and avoids warnings or errors in newer compiler versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add release flag to the test compiler configuration to ensure tests are compiled for Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without the `release` flag, tests might be compiled with default or legacy settings, potentially causing runtime incompatibilities with Java 21 features or APIs.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial on serialVersionUID, the code may fail to compile or trigger warnings/errors depending on the compiler configuration (e.g., --enable-preview or specific linting rules enabled in the migration recipe).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial on serialVersionUID, the code may fail to compile with --enable-preview or fail static analysis tools enforcing modern serialization standards.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available without importing java.io.Serial, causing a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial on serialVersionUID, the code may fail to compile if strict serialization checks are enabled or result in warnings/errors in modern tooling expecting explicit serialization metadata.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field in a serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 17+.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Serial.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: 'serialVersionUID' is not a serial component and must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+.
